title: rhodax hymettius
side_effects: Rhodax hymettius can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and inflammation. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract may lead to nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of volatile compounds. Additionally, long-term use of Rhodax hymettius without proper medical supervision may cause kidney strain and liver damage in susceptible individuals. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid potential health complications.
